_comment: Demo question catalog — maps question IDs to phenotype IDs and provides display metadata. All three questions share the same base phenotype (T2DM+CKD+SGLT2) but represent different study intents.

q-sglt2-ckd-t2dm-001.label: SGLT2 cohort definition
q-sglt2-ckd-t2dm-001.short_description: Cohort definition and evidence search for SGLT2 inhibitors in T2DM+CKD adults

q-sglt2-ckd-data-elem-001.label: Data elements for SGLT2 initiation study
q-sglt2-ckd-data-elem-001.short_description: Structured data elements required to study SGLT2 inhibitor initiation in T2DM+CKD

q-sglt2-ckd-outcome-eval-001.label: Outcome evaluation cohort template
q-sglt2-ckd-outcome-eval-001.short_description: Configurable outcome evaluation cohort for prevalent SGLT2 inhibitor users

pheno-sglt2-ckd-t2dm-001.name: SGLT2 Inhibitor Cohort — Type 2 Diabetes + Chronic Kidney Disease
